debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DecidableEq α
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSingletonClass α
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) (Bandit.measure alg ν)

failed_attempts:
classical
  -- `rewardByCount a` is a measurable function of the reward stream `ω.2 · a`,
  -- and similarly for `b`; these two streams are independent under `𝔓`.
  refine (indepFun_eval_reward_stream_measure (alg := alg) (ν := ν) hab).comp
    (f := fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount a (n + 1) ω)
    (g := fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount b (n + 1) ω)
    (h₁ := fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (h₂ := fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) ?_ ?_
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a s` depends only on the stream `Z _ a`, and `rewardByCount b s` only on `Z _ b`.
  -- Those streams are independent for `a ≠ b`.
  refine (indepFun_iff_indepFun_finset (μ := 𝔓) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).2 ?_
  intro t₁ t₂ ht
  have h_indep_streams :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n : ℕ ↦ ω.2 n a)
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n : ℕ ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    -- independence of different coordinates in `Bandit.streamMeasure` transported to `𝔓`
    -- via `Bandit.snd_measure`.
    have h0 :
        IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun n : ℕ ↦ ω n a)
          (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun n : ℕ ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      -- coordinates `a` and `b` of the infinite product are independent
      simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
        (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_infinitePi_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
    -- push forward along `Prod.snd`
    have h1 :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n : ℕ ↦ ω.2 n a)
          (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n : ℕ ↦ ω.2 n b)
          ((Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map Prod.snd) := by
      simpa using h0.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd
    -- rewrite `((Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map Prod.snd)` as `𝔓` using `Bandit.snd_measure`
    simpa [Bandit.snd_measure alg ν, Measure.snd] using h1
  -- now conclude for the finite sets by measurably expressing each `rewardByCount` from the stream
  -- and using stability of independence under measurable maps.
  have hmeas_a : Measurable (fun z : (ℕ → ℝ) × Finset ℕ ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ z.1 (s - 1)) := by
    fun_prop
  have hmeas_b : Measurable (fun z : (ℕ → ℝ) × Finset ℕ ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ z.1 (s - 1)) := by
    fun_prop
  -- use the characterization through the `Z` stream at `a` and `b`
  have ha :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω)
        = fun ω s ↦ (ω.2 (stepsUntil a s ω.1) a) := by
    rfl
  have hb :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω)
        = fun ω s ↦ (ω.2 (stepsUntil b s ω.1) b) := by
    rfl
  -- Apply `IndepFun.comp` to the independent streams.
  -- We reduce to independence of functions of disjoint coordinates, already in `h_indep_streams`.
  -- The finite-set version follows from `h_indep_streams` directly.
  simpa [ha, hb] using (h_indep_streams.indepFun_finset ht).comp
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  simpa [rewardByCount] using indepFun_pi_of_ne (μ := 𝔓) hab

classical
  have ha : iIndepFun (rewardByCount a) 𝔓 := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν a
  have hb : iIndepFun (rewardByCount b) 𝔓 := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν b
  have h₁ : (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) ⟂ᵢ[𝔓]
      (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ ω.2 s a) :=
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount_stream alg ν a).indepFun
  have h₂ : (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) ⟂ᵢ[𝔓]
      (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ ω.2 s b) :=
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount_stream alg ν b).indepFun
  have h_stream : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ ω s a)
      (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_infinitePi (ν := ν) hab)
  have h_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ ω.2 s a)
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 := by
    have : IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (Prod.snd ω))
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (Prod.snd ω)) 𝔓 := by
      simpa using (indepFun_id id (μ := 𝔓))
    have h_map : (𝔓).map Prod.snd = Bandit.streamMeasure ν := by
      simpa [Bandit.snd_measure] using (Bandit.snd_measure alg ν)
    have h' :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ (Prod.snd ω) s a)
          (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s : ℕ ↦ (Prod.snd ω) s b) 𝔓 := by
      simpa using (h_stream.comp_measure_map (μ := 𝔓) (f := Prod.snd) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
    simpa using h'
  exact (h₁.trans h_stream').trans h₂.symm
simpa [rewardByCount] using indepFun_stepsUntil_Z_of_ne (alg := alg) (ν := ν) hab

classical
  -- identify both families with evaluations of the independent stream of rewards
  have hida :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  have hidb :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
  have hIndep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 := by
    -- reduce to independence under the stream measure, where coordinates are independent
    have h₂ :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s a)
          𝔓 (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
      (identDistrib_eval_streamMeasure_measure (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a).symm
    have h₃ :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b)
          𝔓 (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
      (identDistrib_eval_streamMeasure_measure (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b).symm
    have h_stream : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      -- these are functions of disjoint coordinates in the product space
      simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
        (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_infinitePi_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
    exact (h₂.indepFun_iff h₃).2 h_stream
  -- shift back from (s+1) to s; the 0-th pull is constant and does not affect independence
  have hIndep_pos :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓 := by
    exact (hida.indepFun_iff hidb).2 hIndep_stream
  -- conclude by precomposing both sides with Nat.succ, and using that the 0th coordinate is constant
  have hconsta : (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount a 0 ω) = fun _ : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (0 : ℝ) := by
    ext ω
    simp [rewardByCount]
  have hconstb : (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount b 0 ω) = fun _ : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (0 : ℝ) := by
    ext ω
    simp [rewardByCount]
  refine indepFun_of_forall_finset ?_
  intro s t hs ht
  classical
  by_cases hs0 : 0 ∈ s
  · have : IndepFun (fun ω i : {n // n ∈ s} ↦ rewardByCount a i.1 ω)
        (fun ω j : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount b j.1 ω) 𝔓 := by
        -- replace index 0 by a constant and shift all indices by 1
        have hs' : IndepFun
            (fun ω i : {n // n ∈ s} ↦
              if (i.1 = 0) then (0 : ℝ) else rewardByCount a (i.1) ω)
            (fun ω j : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount b j.1 ω) 𝔓 := by
          -- left is a measurable modification of the original
          simpa [hconsta] using (indepFun_congr_left (μ := 𝔓)
            (f := fun ω i : {n // n ∈ s} ↦ rewardByCount a i.1 ω)
            (g := fun ω i : {n // n ∈ s} ↦ if (i.1 = 0) then (0 : ℝ) else rewardByCount a i.1 ω)
            (by
              intro ω i
              by_cases hi : i.1 = 0 <;> simp [hi, hconsta]))
        -- now drop the (if) by splitting off the constant coordinate
        -- constants are independent of everything
        exact hs'.mono_left (by
          intro ω i
          by_cases hi : i.1 = 0 <;> simp [hi])
      exact this
  · -- if 0 ∉ s, shift indices down via succ inverse: s ⊆ {n+1}
    have hspos : ∀ n ∈ s, n ≠ 0 := by
      intro n hn
      exact fun h => hs0 (h ▸ hn)
    -- reduce to independence on (n+1) coordinates
    have : IndepFun
        (fun ω i : {n // n ∈ s} ↦ rewardByCount a (i.1) ω)
        (fun ω j : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount b (j.1) ω) 𝔓 := by
      -- rewrite each index as (k+1) using Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero
      let eS : {n // n ∈ s} → ℕ := fun i =>
        Nat.pred i.1
      have heS : ∀ i : {n // n ∈ s}, eS i + 1 = i.1 := by
        intro i
        have : i.1 ≠ 0 := hspos i.1 i.2
        simpa [eS, Nat.pred_succ] using (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero this)).symm
      let eT : {n // n ∈ t} → ℕ := fun j =>
        Nat.pred j.1
      have heT : ∀ j : {n // n ∈ t}, eT j + 1 = j.1 := by
        intro j
        by_cases hj : j.1 = 0
        · simp [eT, hj]
        · simpa [eT, Nat.pred_succ] using (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hj)).symm
      have hpre : IndepFun
          (fun ω i : {n // n ∈ s} ↦ rewardByCount a (eS i + 1) ω)
          (fun ω j : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount b (eT j + 1) ω) 𝔓 := by
        exact hIndep_pos.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      -- conclude by rewriting
      refine hpre.congr ?_ ?_
      · intro ω i; simpa [heS i]
      · intro ω j; simpa [heT j]
    exact this

classical
  simpa [rewardByCount, hab] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_of_ne (alg := alg) (ν := ν) hab)

classical
  by_cases hα : Nonempty α
  · letI : Nonempty α := hα
    by_cases hcount : Countable α
    · letI : Countable α := hcount
      by_cases hsb : StandardBorelSpace α
      · letI : StandardBorelSpace α := hsb
        -- reduce to independence of the evaluation functions in the stream measure
        have h_idA :
            IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
          identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
        have h_idB :
            IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
          identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
        have h_indep_eval :
            IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 := by
          -- pull back independence from the stream measure
          have h_indep_stream :
              IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
            simpa using indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab
          have h_id_stream :
              IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) 𝔓 :=
            identDistrib_eval_streamMeasure_measure (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
          have h_id_stream' :
              IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) 𝔓 :=
            identDistrib_eval_streamMeasure_measure (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
          exact (h_indep_stream.comp_identDistrib h_id_stream h_id_stream').symm
        have h_indep_plus :
            IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓 := by
          exact h_indep_eval.comp_identDistrib h_idA.symm h_idB.symm
        -- extend to `s : ℕ` by splitting at 0
        have h_measA : Measurable (fun p : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount a p.2.2 p.1) := by
          fun_prop
        have h_measB : Measurable (fun p : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount b p.2.2 p.1) := by
          fun_prop
        refine (h_indep_plus.comp (μ := 𝔓) (f := fun (ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) (s : ℕ) ↦
            if hs : s = 0 then (0 : ℝ) else rewardByCount a s ω)
          (g := fun (ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) (s : ℕ) ↦
            if hs : s = 0 then (0 : ℝ) else rewardByCount b s ω)) ?_ ?_
        · intro ω s
          by_cases hs : s = 0
          · simp [hs]
          · obtain ⟨t, rfl⟩ : ∃ t, s = t + 1 := by
              refine ⟨s - 1, ?_⟩
              exact (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs)).symm
            simp
        · intro ω s
          by_cases hs : s = 0
          · simp [hs]
          · obtain ⟨t, rfl⟩ : ∃ t, s = t + 1 := by
              refine ⟨s - 1, ?_⟩
              exact (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs)).symm
            simp
      · -- without `StandardBorelSpace`, use the trivial independence on a subsingleton
        have : Subsingleton α := by
          classical
          exact (not_nonempty_iff.mp (fun x ↦ False.elim (hsb ⟨⟨a⟩⟩))).elim
        exact (hab (Subsingleton.elim _ _)).elim
    · have : Subsingleton α := by
        classical
        exact (not_countable_iff.mp (fun x ↦ False.elim (hcount ⟨⟨a⟩⟩))).elim
      exact (hab (Subsingleton.elim _ _)).elim
  · have : False := by exact hα ⟨a⟩
    exact this.elim

classical

classical
  by_cases ha : a ∈ (∅ : Finset α)
  · simp at ha
  by_cases hb : b ∈ (∅ : Finset α)
  · simp at hb
  simpa [IndepFun, hab] using
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount (alg := alg) (ν := ν)).indepFun_pair (p := (a, ·)) (q := (b, ·))
      (by
        intro n m hnm
        have : (a, n) ≠ (b, m) := by
          intro h
          exact hab (congrArg Prod.fst h)
        exact this)

classical
  have hi : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  have hi' := hi.indepFun_pair (i := (a, 0)) (j := (b, 0)) (by
    intro h
    exact hab (Prod.ext_iff.mp h).1)
  simpa [IndepFun, Function.comp] using hi'

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a` depends only on the reward stream at arm `a`,
  -- and similarly for `b`. Those coordinates are independent under the product measure.
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun s ↦ ω s b)
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_infinitePi_of_ne (ν := ν) a b hab)
  have h_indep_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ ω.2 s a)
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.trajMeasure, Bandit.streamMeasure] using h_indep_stream.comp_right measurable_snd
  have h_id_a : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) = fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a := by
    funext ω s
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp [rewardByCount]
    | succ m =>
      simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, arm, reward, hab]
  have h_id_b : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) = fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b := by
    funext ω s
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp [rewardByCount]
    | succ m =>
      simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, arm, reward, hab]
  simpa [h_id_a, h_id_b] using h_indep_stream'

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a s` is a measurable function of the reward stream at arm `a`,
  -- and similarly for `b`. These streams are independent under `𝔓`.
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n ↦ ω.2 n a)
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure] using (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_measure (alg := alg) (ν := ν) hab)
  have h_meas_a :
      Measurable (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) := by
    fun_prop
  have h_meas_b :
      Measurable (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) := by
    fun_prop
  -- Use measurable dependence of `rewardByCount` on each arm's reward stream.
  refine h_indep_stream.comp ?_ ?_
  · exact h_meas_a
  · exact h_meas_b

classical
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω p : α × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω)
      (fun ω p : α × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω) 𝔓 :=
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount (alg := alg) (ν := ν)).indepFun_pair (by

  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
    have h := h_indep (i := (a, (0 : ℕ))) (j := (b, (0 : ℕ))) (by
      intro h'
      exact hab (congrArg Prod.fst h'))

classical
  -- rewrite both processes as coordinate projections of the reward stream
  have hIa :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  have hIb :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
  have hIndepStream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    -- the reward streams for different arms are independent under `𝔓`
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab).map
        (f := fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  -- shift indices to start at 0 instead of 1
  have hIndepShift :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓 := by
    refine hIndepStream.comp (μ := 𝔓)
      (IdentDistrib.indepFun_congr hIa.symm hIb.symm) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  -- extend to `s = 0` (both sides constant 0 there)
  refine indepFun_of_indepFun_of_eq_const (μ := 𝔓)
    (f := fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (g := fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω)
    (s := {0}) 0 0 ?_ ?_ ?_
  · intro ω hs
    have : (0 : ℕ) = 0 := rfl
    simp [rewardByCount, hs]
  · intro ω hs
    simp [rewardByCount, hs]
  · -- on the complement of `{0}`, use the shifted independence
    have : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓 :=
      hIndepShift
    simpa [Set.compl_singleton, Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using this

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a s` depends only on the rewards of arm `a`, and similarly for `b`.
  -- Those coordinates are independent under the product stream measure, hence under `𝔓`.
  simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.streamMeasure] using
    (indepFun_pi_eval_pi_eval_infinitePi_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)

classical
  -- rewrite both processes as evaluation of the reward stream, then use independence of distinct coordinates
  have hA :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  have hB :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 := by
    -- under `𝔓`, the stream component is an infinite product measure over arms, hence distinct arms are independent
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
        .comp (measurable_snd) (measurable_snd)
  have h_indep_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Function.comp] using h_indep_stream.comp measurable_id measurable_id
      (g₁ := fun s : ℕ ↦ s - 1) (g₂ := fun s : ℕ ↦ s - 1) (by fun_prop)
  -- transfer independence along identDistrib
  refine (h_indep_stream'.identDistrib_comp_left ?_).identDistrib_comp_right ?_
  · refine (hA.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
    refine IdentDistrib.refl (by fun_prop)
  · refine (hB.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
    refine IdentDistrib.refl (by fun_prop)

classical
  simpa [rewardByCount] using indepFun_stepsUntil_Z_of_ne (alg := alg) (ν := ν) hab

classical
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω)
      (fun ω (q : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount q.1 q.2 ω) 𝔓 :=
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount (alg := alg) (ν := ν)).indepFun_of_ne
      (i := (a, (0 : ℕ))) (j := (b, (0 : ℕ))) (by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using hab)
  simpa [IndepFun] using h_indep.comp
    (f := fun s ↦ (a, s)) (g := fun s ↦ (b, s)) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  have ha : iIndepFun (rewardByCount a) 𝔓 := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  have hb : iIndepFun (rewardByCount b) 𝔓 := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
  have hab' : IndepFun (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω)
      (fun ω (q : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount q.1 q.2 ω) 𝔓 := by
    exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount (alg := alg) (ν := ν)).indepFun
  have h1 :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω)
        = fun ω s ↦ (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω) ω (a, s) := by
    rfl
  have h2 :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω)
        = fun ω s ↦ (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω) ω (b, s) := by
    rfl
  have h_ind :
      IndepFun
        (fun ω s ↦ (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω) ω (a, s))
        (fun ω s ↦ (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ω) ω (b, s)) 𝔓 := by
    refine (iIndepFun_rewardByCount (alg := alg) (ν := ν)).indepFun_precomp ?_ ?_ ?_
    · intro i j hij
      have : (a, i) ≠ (b, j) := by
        intro h
        have : a = b := by exact congrArg Prod.fst h
        exact hab this
      exact this
    · fun_prop
    · fun_prop
  simpa [h1, h2]
